name: Analyze Pharmaceutical Supply Chain Capabilities and Capacity
description: This process involves analyzing the pharmaceutical supply chain's capabilities and capacity to meet demand while ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements such as GxP, GMP, and GDP. It includes evaluating the supply chain's ability to maintain batch traceability, manage audit trails, and implement electronic signatures, as well as validating automated decisions and documenting them according to GxP guidelines.
sector_specific_outputs: capability analysis with risk assessment for pharmaceutical products
CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Action) process documentation
sector_specific_kpis: supplier performance in terms of quality and compliance
capacity utilization rate for critical pharmaceutical manufacturing equipment
regulatory_requirements: 21 CFR Part 11 (Electronic Records and Signatures) compliance
compliance_frameworks: GAMP 5 (Good Automated Manufacturing Practice) for automated systems
ISO 13485 (Medical Devices) for quality management systems
notes: Implementation of this process requires careful consideration of regulatory requirements and validation of automated decisions. The AI agent should be trained on pharmaceutical industry data and be able to handle complex validation and documentation requirements.
